evidenceDetail.text: QUERY EVIDENCE 4 metadata rows returned x STATEMENT 01F146BB-2C46-18BF-93C2-EE03C770FBCB WITH dashboard_assets AS ( SELECT asset_fqn, domain, data_product, criticality, certification, owner_count, open_work_count, is_critical, is_certified FROM `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_assets_current` WHERE lower(asset_fqn) LIKE '%executive%' OR lower(table_name) LIKE '%executive%' OR lower(data_product) LIKE '%executive%' OR lower(domain) LIKE '%executive%' OR lower(asset_fqn) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(table_name) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(data_product) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(domain) LIKE '%dashboard%' ) SELECT da.asset_fqn, da.domain, da.data_product, da.criticality, da.certification, da.owner_count, da.open_work_count, da.is_critical, da.is_certified, gw.work_id, gw.status AS work_status, gw.created_at AS work_created_at, ql.column_name, ql.outcome, ql.severity, ql.metric_value, ql.threshold_value, ql.detail, ql.executed_at FROM dashboard_assets da LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_governance_work_current` gw ON da.asset_fqn = gw.asset_fqn AND lower(COALESCE(gw.status, '')) IN ('pending', 'open') AND gw.created_at >= DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_DATE) LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`at

evidenceDetail.text: QUERY EVIDENCE 4 metadata rows returned x STATEMENT 01F146BB-2C46-18BF-93C2-EE03C770FBCB WITH dashboard_assets AS ( SELECT asset_fqn, domain, data_product, criticality, certification, owner_count, open_work_count, is_critical, is_certified FROM `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_assets_current` WHERE lower(asset_fqn) LIKE '%executive%' OR lower(table_name) LIKE '%executive%' OR lower(data_product) LIKE '%executive%' OR lower(domain) LIKE '%executive%' OR lower(asset_fqn) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(table_name) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(data_product) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(domain) LIKE '%dashboard%' ) SELECT da.asset_fqn, da.domain, da.data_product, da.criticality, da.certification, da.owner_count, da.open_work_count, da.is_critical, da.is_certified, gw.work_id, gw.status AS work_status, gw.created_at AS work_created_at, ql.column_name, ql.outcome, ql.severity, ql.metric_value, ql.threshold_value, ql.detail, ql.executed_at FROM dashboard_assets da LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_governance_work_current` gw ON da.asset_fqn = gw.asset_fqn AND lower(COALESCE(gw.status, '')) IN ('pending', 'open') AND gw.created_at >= DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_DATE) LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`at

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 64.9% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset.
